steps.title: Substitute the time
steps.content: The model is $s=40+3t$, and the question asks for the speed after $5$ seconds. Substitute $t=5$: $$s=40+3(5).$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is correct. Choice A is only the initial speed, and choices B and C do not add the full $3$ mph per second for $5$ seconds.
